violations.description: Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Opened beverage was found on the table near the refrigerated prep table by the soup. Personal items should be stored separated from food prep and storage areas.

Demonstration of conformance with variance. — --License holder did not demonstrate conformance with approved variance or HACCP procedures. HACCP plan and associated logs for vacuum sealed items were not available during inspection. HACCP plan and logs should be available for review during inspection.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Surface of equipment/utensil did not reach minimum temperature of 160F during hot water sanitize rinse of warewash machine. Thermometer readings found at 157.8F, and 157.6F after running it through the high temp dishwasher during inspection. Equipment should reach 160F after running through the dishwasher in order to sanitize with hot water.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single-use cups and lids were found on the floor next to the ice maker during inspection. Single-use items should be stored off of the floor.

Demonstration of conformance with variance. — --License holder did not demonstrate conformance with approved variance or HACCP procedures. License holder did not demonstrate conformance with approved variance or HACCP procedures. Logs for vacuum sealing of raw meats were not maintained as stated in the HACCP plan. -Refrigeration temperature log is not completed daily. Temperatures should be checked twice a day. -Thermometer validation log has not been completed. This should be done weekly.
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Fruits and vegetables washed, handling, sink provided (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
